\tzpentry{ID3500}{Trunc Delta Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3500 introduces Trunc Delta Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \delta_{\text{trunc}}(r,\hat n)=\sum_{(\ell,m,k)\in\mathcal{S}} \delta_{\ell m}(k)\, j_\ell(kr)\, Y_\ell^m(\hat n). \]
